title: VECC Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 09 Posts
org: Variable Energy Cyclotron Centre (VECC), Department of Atomic Energy, Kolkata
shortInfo: VECC Kolkata is offering 9 Junior Research Fellowships with excellent research environment in frontier areas of Physical Sciences. Last date for receipt of application is 31 May 2026.

basic_details.job_title: VECC Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 09 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Variable Energy Cyclotron Centre (VECC), Department of Atomic Energy, Kolkata
basic_details.short_information: VECC Kolkata is offering 9 Junior Research Fellowships with excellent research environment in frontier areas of Physical Sciences. Last date for receipt of application is 31 May 2026.

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for this recruitment. Candidates only need to send the application through email with required documents.

age_limit.details: Candidates should be less than 28 years of age as on 31-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Option 1: M.Sc. (Physics) with minimum 55% aggregate marks. Option 2: 5-Year Integrated M.Sc. / B.S.-M.S. (Physics) with minimum 55% aggregate. Option 3: 4-Year / 8-Semester B.S. (Physics) with fourth year research with minimum 75% aggregate. Candidates awaiting final results can also apply with minimum required percentage up to previous semester/year.

vacancy_details.Research Areas: Experimental & Theoretical High Energy Nuclear Physics

selection_process: Selection will be based on screening of applications followed by Offline Interview. Shortlisting will be done based on performance in national-level exams and academic records. Final selection depends on performance in the interview. Allotment of research topic will be decided after pre-Ph.D. course work.
how_to_apply: Candidates must send the duly filled application form through email only to [email protected] on or before 31-05-2026.
Documents to be Sent Along with Application:
Passport size photo (JPEG, <1 MB)
Proof of Date of Birth (SSC/Matriculation or Birth Certificate)
Caste Certificate (if applicable)
Mark sheets and Certificates of qualifying degree
Score card / Certificate of National Level Exam (GATE/JEST/CSIR-NET)
Step-by-Step Application Process:
Download the prescribed Application Form from the notification.
Fill all details carefully including research interest and national exam details.
Attach all supporting documents in proper format.
Send the complete application through email to [email protected] before 31-05-2026.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed for offline interview at VECC, Kolkata.
important_instructions: This is a fellowship for pursuing Ph.D. programme. No claim for permanent absorption. Interviews will be conducted in offline mode only. Selected candidates must join on 03-08-2026. Fellowship is as per DAE guidelines (Rs.37,000/- to Rs.42,000/- + HRA/Hostel). Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for VECC Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) Recruitment 2026 is 31 May 2026. Candidates must send their duly filled application form along with all required documents through email before the deadline. Late or incomplete applications may not be considered for further selection.

faq.question: Q2. How many fellowships are available in VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 09 Junior Research Fellowships (JRFs) have been announced by Variable Energy Cyclotron Centre (VECC), Kolkata. These fellowships are offered in advanced research fields such as Nuclear Physics, Astrophysics, Accelerator Physics, Material Science, and Applied Physics. The final allocation may vary based on institutional requirements and candidate performance.

faq.question: Q3. What educational qualification is required for VECC JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks, or an Integrated M.Sc./B.S.-M.S. degree in Physics with the same minimum percentage. Candidates with a 4-year B.S. degree in Physics and at least 75% aggregate marks are also eligible. Students awaiting final results can apply if they meet the required academic percentage till their latest semester.

faq.question: Q4. Is a national-level exam score mandatory for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must possess a valid score or certificate in a recognized national-level examination. Accepted exams include UGC-CSIR NET Fellowship, JEST, or GATE in Physics. However, candidates having only NET Lectureship eligibility without Fellowship are not eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants should be below 28 years of age as on 31 May 2026 to be eligible for the fellowship. Age relaxation benefits are available for reserved category candidates as per Government of India rules. OBC candidates receive 3 years relaxation, while SC/ST candidates are eligible for 5 years relaxation.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply through email only by sending the completed application form and supporting documents to the official email ID mentioned in the notification. Applications through offline mode, post, or any other method will not be accepted. Candidates should verify all details carefully before submission.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for VECC Junior Research Fellowship Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply free of cost by emailing the required documents and application form. This makes the process accessible to all eligible candidates without any payment burden.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications followed by an offline interview at VECC, Kolkata. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic performance and valid national-level exam scores. Final selection will depend on performance during the interview and research suitability.

faq.question: Q9. What fellowship benefits will selected candidates receive under VECC JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly fellowship as per DAE norms, ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 along with HRA or hostel facility. Fellows will also get an opportunity to pursue a Ph.D. at Homi Bhabha National Institute (HBNI) while working in cutting-edge scientific research areas.

faq.question: Q10. When will the interview and joining process take place for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The offline interviews are tentatively scheduled between 19 June and 24 June 2026, and the final selected candidates list is expected on 30 June 2026. Candidates selected for the fellowship are expected to join the programme on 03 August 2026 and begin their research journey at VECC, Kolkata.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for VECC JRF Recruitment 2026?
